message:
test(engine): parser infrastructure enrichment — events, parallel timeout policy, evidence indexer

parser.rs (+96 lines):
  Parse event serde roundtrip tests and additional parser behavior validation
  for the world-class-parser initiative.

parallel_parser.rs (+452 lines):
  Timeout policy derivation and cancellation handling tests. New fields
  (timeout_policy, cancellation, backpressure) for parallel execution
  configuration. Deterministic worker scheduling and parity verification.

parser_evidence_indexer.rs (+5 lines):
  Minor updates to indexed event row construction and schema migration checks.

tests/parallel_parser_integration.rs (+86 lines):
  Integration tests for parallel parser deterministic execution across
  seeds, schedules, and worker counts.

tests/parser_event_ast_equivalence.rs (+2 lines):
  Replay scenario determinism assertion refinement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
